title: Matt Shepard Is a Friend of Mine
original_title: Matt Shepard Is a Friend of Mine
overview: An intimate portrait of Matthew Shepard, the gay young man murdered in one of the most notorious hate crimes in U.S. history. Framed through a personal lens, it's the story of loss, love, and courage in the face of unspeakable tragedy.
